parameters.jsCode:
const v = $('Validate Input').first().json;
return [{ json: {
  referenceId: v.referenceId || 'unknown',
  invoiceNumber: v.invoiceNumber,
  contactId: v.contactId,
  customerName: v.customerName,
  customerEmail: v.customerEmail,
  paymentAmount: v.paymentAmount,
  currency: v.currency,
  payment_link: '',
  payment_id: '',
  validation_status: 'validation_failed',
  final_status: 'validation_failed',
  created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  error_detail: v.errors.map(e => e.field + ': ' + e.reason).join('; ')
} }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, referenceId: $('Validate Input').first().json.referenceId, status: 'Already processed', data: { payment_link: $('Check Duplicate').first().json.existingPaymentLink } } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const v = $('Validate Input').first().json;
return [{ json: {
  referenceId: v.referenceId,
  invoiceNumber: v.invoiceNumber,
  contactId: v.contactId,
  customerName: v.customerName,
  customerEmail: v.customerEmail,
  paymentAmount: v.paymentAmount,

  payment_link: '',
  payment_id: '',
  validation_status: 'validation_passed',
  final_status: 'received',
  created_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  error_detail: ''
} }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, referenceId: $('Validate Input').first().json.referenceId, status: 'Payment link generated and record updated', data: { payment_link: $('Build U4 Input').first().json.payment_link } } }}
